title: [Epic] V2 Portal Visual Alignments & Unified Quotas Saves
body: This epic tracks visual alignment fixes, transparency corrections, clipboard copy functions, and unified quota save behaviors across the Liferay Tunnel V2 portal.

issues.title: Sub-Issue #1: Edge Health Action Menu Dropdown Clipping & Transparency
issues.body: Fix the transparent background and clipping of the context action menu on the Network Health screen.

issues.title: Sub-Issue #2: Client Installation Modal Backdrop Transparency and Color Contrast
issues.body: Increase background contrast in the client installation modal, swapping transparent backgrounds to solid `var(--bg-base)` and fixing undefined `var(--text)` labels to `var(--text-main)`.

issues.title: Sub-Issue #3: Console Upgrade Copy Clipboard Tool
issues.body: Implement a copy-to-clipboard button and state indicator next to the CLI update warning banner command.

issues.title: Sub-Issue #4: Rate Limit Badges in Subdomains Dashboard
issues.body: Map and render active rate limits to the Subdomains table rows, showing dynamic limit indicator warning badges on throttled subdomains.

issues.title: Sub-Issue #5: Unified Quota Saves & Clickable Columns in Users Table
issues.body: Make user names column clickable to display details, add an explicit Details action button to row action cells, and combine Quota settings save buttons to a single Save button sending a batch PATCH request.

issues.title: Sub-Issue #6: Export PDF Height Normalization
issues.body: Set explicit heights on the Export PDF button to match the visual height of standard link buttons (Export CSV).
